skills.summary: CMOS circuit design, SPICE simulation, open-source PDK flow, and layout verification.
RTL design, FPGA implementation, bus interfaces, pipelining, and clock-domain crossing.
Simulation-first hardware development with testbenches, formal checks, CI, and coverage.
Mixed-signal board design, sensor interfaces, ADC signal chains, isolation, and practical bring-up.
Firmware, C/C++, RTOS concepts, board-level integration, and low-level debugging.
Python-based analysis, automation, early ML work, and data-structure/software projects.
Bench-level debugging and measurement workflows for electronics projects.

toolGroups.summary: Open-source silicon and mixed-signal IC tools used for schematic capture, SPICE simulation, layout, and verification.
toolGroups.context: Used for Sky130-based analog and mixed-signal projects including schematic simulation, layout, DRC, and LVS checks.

toolGroups.summary: Tools and platforms used for firmware development, wireless device work, chipset integration, and board-level debugging.
toolGroups.context: Used across industrial embedded systems and personal electronics projects, especially where firmware connects directly to sensors, wireless modules, and custom hardware.

toolGroups.summary: Tools used for sensor data collection, device communication, containers, dashboards, and real-time engineering visibility.
toolGroups.context: Used during industry placement work involving IIoT devices, MQTT data movement, Python services, Docker-based deployment, Grafana dashboards, and early machine-learning workflows.

toolGroups.summary: Hardware design and bench tools used for schematic capture, PCB layout, mixed-signal signal chains, and practical electronics debugging.
toolGroups.context: Used for custom PCB design, sensor interfaces, motor current sensing, ADC boards, simulation, measurement, and hardware bring-up.

toolGroups.summary: Mechanical CAD and rapid-prototyping tools used for enclosures, brackets, mounting parts, and electronics packaging.
toolGroups.context: Useful for showing that hardware work does not stop at the PCB: boards still need mechanical fit, mounting, cable access, enclosure design, and printed prototypes.

toolGroups.summary: Robotics and vision tools used for navigation, localisation, optical-flow motion estimation, and sensor fusion.
toolGroups.context: Used in MarsWorks and Pipebots work for rover localisation, SLAM, camera-based motion estimation, and robot sensor integration.

toolGroups.summary: Digital design and verification tools used for RTL development, simulation, formal checks, and CI-style validation.
toolGroups.context: Used for FPGA and digital logic projects including FIR filters, asynchronous FIFOs, AES pipelines, and verification-focused hardware design.
